source_intake_record.raw_question_text: An adiabatic steam turbine in a power plant receives 5 kg/s steam at 3000 kPa, 500\circ\text{C}. Twenty percent of the flow is extracted at 1000 kPa, 350\circ\text{C} to a feedwater heater, and the remainder flows out at 200 kPa, 200\circ\text{C}. Find the turbine power output.

Twenty percent of the flow is extracted at 1000 kPa, 350\circ\text{C} to a feedwater heater, and the remainder flows out at 200 kPa, 200\circ\text{C}. Find the turbine power output.
